note: Accepted, documented differences between the Markdown-generated FIX 4.4 dictionary and QuickFIX FIX44.xml. Each entry is pinned by its exact value-bearing signature; the CI drift gate fails on any difference not listed here, and on any listed difference that no longer occurs. Regenerate with `pnpm --filter @boarteam/fix-codegen crosscheck --write-baseline`.

ignoredFields.201: PutOrCall — deprecated in FIX 4.4 (use CFICode); retained by QuickFIX in Instrument
ignoredFields.315: UnderlyingPutOrCall — deprecated in FIX 4.4; retained by QuickFIX in UnderlyingInstrument
